description: As the content marketing manager at NestWell, a home décor brand, set up the Autumn Collection 2024 promotional content. Create a CMS Static Block with identifier 'autumn-collection-featured', title 'Autumn Collection Featured Products', and status Enabled, containing HTML with an h2 heading, a paragraph, and a list of at least 3 product categories. Additionally, create a CMS Page titled 'Autumn Collection 2024' (URL key: 'autumn-collection-2024', status Enabled, layout 1 column, meta title 'Autumn Collection 2024 | NestWell Home') that embeds the static block using {{block id="autumn-collection-featured"}}. Use credentials admin/Admin1234! if required.
